caption: A woman is seen from the chest up in an indoor setting, wearing a purple and white striped button-down shirt and a black over-ear headset with a microphone. She has long dark hair and is wearing small earrings. Behind her is a pale wall, a light-colored curtain with a blue edge, and a neutral-toned piece of furniture. The text "Nancy Ramya" is visible in the lower-left corner of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the woman speaks, her mouth opening and closing while her facial expressions shift slightly. In the final sequence, she looks slightly downward and to her right. The camera remains stationary throughout the clip, focusing on her face as she communicates.
